records.m_Talk_ENG: How amusing, Disturber.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How amusing, Disturber.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How amusing, Disturber.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gha'agsheblah is a Divinity collection of information...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gha'agsheblah is a Divinity collection of information...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gha'agsheblah is a Divinity collection of information...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really think someone who was merely a fragment of us could devour us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really think someone who was merely a fragment of us could devour us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really think someone who was merely a fragment of us could devour us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, who knows?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, who knows?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, who knows?

records.m_Talk_ENG: On my own it might be a little difficult, but I am not alone, you see?
records.m_Talk_DEU: On my own it might be a little difficult, but I am not alone, you see?
records.m_Talk_FRA: On my own it might be a little difficult, but I am not alone, you see?

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, our former nemesis, my knight, is with me!
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, our former nemesis, my knight, is with me!
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, our former nemesis, my knight, is with me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll drag you down, Meitner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll drag you down, Meitner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll drag you down, Meitner.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the way to the very bottom of the abyss...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the way to the very bottom of the abyss...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the way to the very bottom of the abyss...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, whether then or now, those chains really are tenacious...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, whether then or now, those chains really are tenacious...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, whether then or now, those chains really are tenacious...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You know it yourself, don't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You know it yourself, don't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You know it yourself, don't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: These chains are weapons forged from a shield solely to bind the likes of you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: These chains are weapons forged from a shield solely to bind the likes of you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: These chains are weapons forged from a shield solely to bind the likes of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The fact that I can wield them even after losing my shield means this was fate from the start!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The fact that I can wield them even after losing my shield means this was fate from the start!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The fact that I can wield them even after losing my shield means this was fate from the start!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's the case, I'll bind you hundreds, even thousands of times, Meitner.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's the case, I'll bind you hundreds, even thousands of times, Meitner.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's the case, I'll bind you hundreds, even thousands of times, Meitner.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Until every last one of your precious Divinity Fragments is completely spent 8
8 8
8 8
8 8
8
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Until every last one of your precious Divinity Fragments is completely spent 8
8 8
8 8
8 8
8
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8 8

8

records.m_Talk_ENG: Edel, deal with the Knight first.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Edel, deal with the Knight first.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Edel, deal with the Knight first.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without the Sealing Chains, defeating the Disturber won't be difficult for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without the Sealing Chains, defeating the Disturber won't be difficult for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without the Sealing Chains, defeating the Disturber won't be difficult for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Regina, did I not warn you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Regina, did I not warn you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Regina, did I not warn you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That freezing time is something you should consider very carefully.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That freezing time is something you should consider very carefully.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That freezing time is something you should consider very carefully.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Regina...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Regina...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Regina...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter if you are the President, you are still a fragile human in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter if you are the President, you are still a fragile human in the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter if you are the President, you are still a fragile human in the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no way you can oppose one who inherited a Demon Lord's hierarchy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no way you can oppose one who inherited a Demon Lord's hierarchy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no way you can oppose one who inherited a Demon Lord's hierarchy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And in this fight, Mother is protecting someone like you while she battles.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And in this fight, Mother is protecting someone like you while she battles.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And in this fight, Mother is protecting someone like you while she battles.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In a situation like this, if the President freezes time...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a situation like this, if the President freezes time...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a situation like this, if the President freezes time...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Gha'agsheblah Fragment will immediately target the President, and she will have no choice but to respond.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Gha'agsheblah Fragment will immediately target the President, and she will have no choice but to respond.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Gha'agsheblah Fragment will immediately target the President, and she will have no choice but to respond.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like a hamster wheel turning, the situation will continue to fall into a stalemate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like a hamster wheel turning, the situation will continue to fall into a stalemate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like a hamster wheel turning, the situation will continue to fall into a stalemate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How does it feel, Dean of Religion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How does it feel, Dean of Religion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How does it feel, Dean of Religion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A scene you have long desired is unfolding right before your eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A scene you have long desired is unfolding right before your eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A scene you have long desired is unfolding right before your eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, that's certainly true.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, that's certainly true.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, that's certainly true.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this war of attrition keeps repeating, those grotesque beings might all end up destroying each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this war of attrition keeps repeating, those grotesque beings might all end up destroying each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this war of attrition keeps repeating, those grotesque beings might all end up destroying each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But since you're going this far, it actually makes me curious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But since you're going this far, it actually makes me curious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But since you're going this far, it actually makes me curious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: About the bigger picture you're envisioning, scriptwriter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: About the bigger picture you're envisioning, scriptwriter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: About the bigger picture you're envisioning, scriptwriter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The bigger picture?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The bigger picture?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The bigger picture?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Charade is annihilated and the Society and the faction come into conflict, what benefit is left for you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Charade is annihilated and the Society and the faction come into conflict, what benefit is left for you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Charade is annihilated and the Society and the faction come into conflict, what benefit is left for you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you simply enjoy watching the world burn? Well, I suppose that wouldn't be so bad either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you simply enjoy watching the world burn? Well, I suppose that wouldn't be so bad either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you simply enjoy watching the world burn? Well, I suppose that wouldn't be so bad either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, of course not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, of course not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, of course not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is only one thing I desire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is only one thing I desire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is only one thing I desire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: World peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: World peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: World peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, you've got quite the audacity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, you've got quite the audacity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, you've got quite the audacity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After plotting a script like this behind the scenes, you claim to want world peace?
records.m_Talk_DEU: After plotting a script like this behind the scenes, you claim to want world peace?
records.m_Talk_FRA: After plotting a script like this behind the scenes, you claim to want world peace?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I mean it sincerely.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I mean it sincerely.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I mean it sincerely.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone I know once said this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone I know once said this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone I know once said this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is a difference between protecting the world as it stands, and protecting it even at the cost of breaking it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is a difference between protecting the world as it stands, and protecting it even at the cost of breaking it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is a difference between protecting the world as it stands, and protecting it even at the cost of breaking it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I can join hands even with a villain like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I can join hands even with a villain like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I can join hands even with a villain like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, calling me a villain outright is rather hurtful, you know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, calling me a villain outright is rather hurtful, you know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, calling me a villain outright is rather hurtful, you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once the omen phenomenon has begun, there was no way to stop it from the start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once the omen phenomenon has begun, there was no way to stop it from the start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once the omen phenomenon has begun, there was no way to stop it from the start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, we use the phenomenon itself to eliminate variables.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, we use the phenomenon itself to eliminate variables.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, we use the phenomenon itself to eliminate variables.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We remove in advance anything that would interfere with the Qliphoth Game that will begin soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We remove in advance anything that would interfere with the Qliphoth Game that will begin soon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We remove in advance anything that would interfere with the Qliphoth Game that will begin soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, it seems the time has finally come.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, it seems the time has finally come.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, it seems the time has finally come.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The time to bring this stalemate to an end by playing the final card we prepared...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The time to bring this stalemate to an end by playing the final card we prepared...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The time to bring this stalemate to an end by playing the final card we prepared...

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's useless, Knight of the Lake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's useless, Knight of the Lake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's useless, Knight of the Lake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are an Apostle. A being of lower standing than the Demon Lords of Qliphoth,
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are an Apostle. A being of lower standing than the Demon Lords of Qliphoth,
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are an Apostle. A being of lower standing than the Demon Lords of Qliphoth,

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those chains are merely a weapon meant to oppose Divinity. It has no meaning to someone without Divinity like me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those chains are merely a weapon meant to oppose Divinity. It has no meaning to someone without Divinity like me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those chains are merely a weapon meant to oppose Divinity. It has no meaning to someone without Divinity like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With my ability, I can counter it as many times as I like.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With my ability, I can counter it as many times as I like.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With my ability, I can counter it as many times as I like.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Truly, a monster of reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Truly, a monster of reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Truly, a monster of reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've only exchanged a single blow, yet you see through everything as if it were laid bare...
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've only exchanged a single blow, yet you see through everything as if it were laid bare...
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've only exchanged a single blow, yet you see through everything as if it were laid bare...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, the human body has clear limits.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, the human body has clear limits.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, the human body has clear limits.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You cannot compare to an Apostle who can draw power from Mother's Qlipha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You cannot compare to an Apostle who can draw power from Mother's Qlipha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You cannot compare to an Apostle who can draw power from Mother's Qlipha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Allow even a single wound, and that will be your end, MacCready.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Allow even a single wound, and that will be your end, MacCready.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Allow even a single wound, and that will be your end, MacCready.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then let us put it to the test, Knight of the Lake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then let us put it to the test, Knight of the Lake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then let us put it to the test, Knight of the Lake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Between the MacCready bloodline and the Apostle of Gha'agsheblah. Let us see who truly bears the Lake's blessing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Between the MacCready bloodline and the Apostle of Gha'agsheblah. Let us see who truly bears the Lake's blessing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Between the MacCready bloodline and the Apostle of Gha'agsheblah. Let us see who truly bears the Lake's blessing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahaha! Don't we look ridiculous, Mother?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahaha! Don't we look ridiculous, Mother?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahaha! Don't we look ridiculous, Mother?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tearing into each other's flesh like this. Is this what you call going in circles?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tearing into each other's flesh like this. Is this what you call going in circles?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tearing into each other's flesh like this. Is this what you call going in circles?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, tasting Mother's flesh again after so long is exquisitely sweet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, tasting Mother's flesh again after so long is exquisitely sweet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, tasting Mother's flesh again after so long is exquisitely sweet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's unfortunate, Disturber.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's unfortunate, Disturber.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's unfortunate, Disturber.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you wanted to stand at eye level with me, you should have gathered far more Fragments.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you wanted to stand at eye level with me, you should have gathered far more Fragments.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you wanted to stand at eye level with me, you should have gathered far more Fragments.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In truth, we've been secretly cheering for you, Disturber.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In truth, we've been secretly cheering for you, Disturber.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In truth, we've been secretly cheering for you, Disturber.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, every Fragment of Gha'agsheblah you collected will eventually return to us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, every Fragment of Gha'agsheblah you collected will eventually return to us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, every Fragment of Gha'agsheblah you collected will eventually return to us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha, so what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha, so what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha, so what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And if that happens, do you think the current Regina, who froze her emotions and became a doll, would be happy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And if that happens, do you think the current Regina, who froze her emotions and became a doll, would be happy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And if that happens, do you think the current Regina, who froze her emotions and became a doll, would be happy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Disturber...! How dare you mock our Regina again...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Disturber...! How dare you mock our Regina again...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Disturber...! How dare you mock our Regina again...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why a mother who only knows to <color=#ff3636>devour</color> can never understand <color=#ff3636>taste</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why a mother who only knows to <color=#ff3636>devour</color> can never understand <color=#ff3636>taste</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why a mother who only knows to <color=#ff3636>devour</color> can never understand <color=#ff3636>taste</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those desperate human emotions are delicacies no information could ever replicate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those desperate human emotions are delicacies no information could ever replicate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those desperate human emotions are delicacies no information could ever replicate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Devouring an emotionless Regina would leave you tasting nothing at all, you know?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Devouring an emotionless Regina would leave you tasting nothing at all, you know?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Devouring an emotionless Regina would leave you tasting nothing at all, you know?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've listened long enough. This conversation has sunk to a level I can no longer tolerate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've listened long enough. This conversation has sunk to a level I can no longer tolerate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've listened long enough. This conversation has sunk to a level I can no longer tolerate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That voice...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That voice...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That voice...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Burnett...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Burnett...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Burnett...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know! Deploying Sealing Chains!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know! Deploying Sealing Chains!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know! Deploying Sealing Chains!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those chains...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those chains...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those chains...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that you? How laughable, you whelp!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that you? How laughable, you whelp!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that you? How laughable, you whelp!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really think chains like these could bind Mother...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really think chains like these could bind Mother...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really think chains like these could bind Mother...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No. I figured if I aimed the Sealing Chains at that girl, you'd come charging in right away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No. I figured if I aimed the Sealing Chains at that girl, you'd come charging in right away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No. I figured if I aimed the Sealing Chains at that girl, you'd come charging in right away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? You don't mean...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? You don't mean...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? You don't mean...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now's the time, rookie! Leave the backup to me...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now's the time, rookie! Leave the backup to me...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now's the time, rookie! Leave the backup to me...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A strike imbued with Divinity?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A strike imbued with Divinity?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A strike imbued with Divinity?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't tell me... a new Gha'agsheblah Fragment...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't tell me... a new Gha'agsheblah Fragment...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't tell me... a new Gha'agsheblah Fragment...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My knight! Are you all right...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My knight! Are you all right...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My knight! Are you all right...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is nothing to worry about, Mother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is nothing to worry about, Mother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is nothing to worry about, Mother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-how was it, Toto...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-how was it, Toto...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-how was it, Toto...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? That's harsh! But still...! It was my first time swinging a sword...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? That's harsh! But still...! It was my first time swinging a sword...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? That's harsh! But still...! It was my first time swinging a sword...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh! You stupid wench! You're seriously frustrating!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh! You stupid wench! You're seriously frustrating!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh! You stupid wench! You're seriously frustrating!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You couldn't even finish off one target, and what? This is your first time swinging a sword?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You couldn't even finish off one target, and what? This is your first time swinging a sword?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You couldn't even finish off one target, and what? This is your first time swinging a sword?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, give me a break! Then what was all that stuff you made me do before, huh? Was I a back scratcher? A flyswatter?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, give me a break! Then what was all that stuff you made me do before, huh? Was I a back scratcher? A flyswatter?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, give me a break! Then what was all that stuff you made me do before, huh? Was I a back scratcher? A flyswatter?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, all bust and no brains. Is your head completely empty?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, all bust and no brains. Is your head completely empty?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, all bust and no brains. Is your head completely empty?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's with the sigh, scumbag? You wanna die?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's with the sigh, scumbag? You wanna die?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's with the sigh, scumbag? You wanna die?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how many times I see it, I can't get used to that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how many times I see it, I can't get used to that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how many times I see it, I can't get used to that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aah, been well, everyone from the Gha'agsheblah family?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aah, been well, everyone from the Gha'agsheblah family?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aah, been well, everyone from the Gha'agsheblah family?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You all look so happy without me and it really makes my blood boil. So I'm the bastard here, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You all look so happy without me and it really makes my blood boil. So I'm the bastard here, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You all look so happy without me and it really makes my blood boil. So I'm the bastard here, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you the...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you the...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you the...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Chaser. The <color=#ffd34c>Hound of Tindalos</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Chaser. The <color=#ffd34c>Hound of Tindalos</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Chaser. The <color=#ffd34c>Hound of Tindalos</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's with the fancy real name? Just call me Toto.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's with the fancy real name? Just call me Toto.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's with the fancy real name? Just call me Toto.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So I call you Mom? Then would this one be Sis?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So I call you Mom? Then would this one be Sis?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So I call you Mom? Then would this one be Sis?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh, that's weird. Why does she look so young?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh, that's weird. Why does she look so young?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh, that's weird. Why does she look so young?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah well, who cares!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah well, who cares!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah well, who cares!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been starving for ages, so I'm planning to eat my fill.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been starving for ages, so I'm planning to eat my fill.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been starving for ages, so I'm planning to eat my fill.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, it's <color=#ff3636>binge</color> time...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, it's <color=#ff3636>binge</color> time...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, it's <color=#ff3636>binge</color> time...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: How amusing, Disturber.
root.m_Talk_DEU: How amusing, Disturber.
root.m_Talk_FRA: How amusing, Disturber.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gha'agsheblah is a Divinity collection of information...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gha'agsheblah is a Divinity collection of information...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gha'agsheblah is a Divinity collection of information...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really think someone who was merely a fragment of us could devour us?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really think someone who was merely a fragment of us could devour us?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really think someone who was merely a fragment of us could devour us?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, who knows?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, who knows?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, who knows?

root.m_Talk_ENG: On my own it might be a little difficult, but I am not alone, you see?
root.m_Talk_DEU: On my own it might be a little difficult, but I am not alone, you see?
root.m_Talk_FRA: On my own it might be a little difficult, but I am not alone, you see?

root.m_Talk_ENG: After all, our former nemesis, my knight, is with me!
root.m_Talk_DEU: After all, our former nemesis, my knight, is with me!
root.m_Talk_FRA: After all, our former nemesis, my knight, is with me!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll drag you down, Meitner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll drag you down, Meitner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll drag you down, Meitner.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All the way to the very bottom of the abyss...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All the way to the very bottom of the abyss...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All the way to the very bottom of the abyss...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, whether then or now, those chains really are tenacious...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, whether then or now, those chains really are tenacious...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, whether then or now, those chains really are tenacious...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You know it yourself, don't you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You know it yourself, don't you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You know it yourself, don't you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: These chains are weapons forged from a shield solely to bind the likes of you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: These chains are weapons forged from a shield solely to bind the likes of you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: These chains are weapons forged from a shield solely to bind the likes of you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The fact that I can wield them even after losing my shield means this was fate from the start!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The fact that I can wield them even after losing my shield means this was fate from the start!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The fact that I can wield them even after losing my shield means this was fate from the start!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that's the case, I'll bind you hundreds, even thousands of times, Meitner.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that's the case, I'll bind you hundreds, even thousands of times, Meitner.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that's the case, I'll bind you hundreds, even thousands of times, Meitner.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Until every last one of your precious Divinity Fragments is completely spent 8

8 8
8 8
8

Until every last one of your precious Divinity Fragments is completely spent 8

8

root.m_Talk_ENG: Edel, deal with the Knight first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Edel, deal with the Knight first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Edel, deal with the Knight first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Without the Sealing Chains, defeating the Disturber won't be difficult for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Without the Sealing Chains, defeating the Disturber won't be difficult for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Without the Sealing Chains, defeating the Disturber won't be difficult for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Regina, did I not warn you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Regina, did I not warn you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Regina, did I not warn you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That freezing time is something you should consider very carefully.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That freezing time is something you should consider very carefully.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That freezing time is something you should consider very carefully.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Regina...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Regina...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Regina...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter if you are the President, you are still a fragile human in the end.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter if you are the President, you are still a fragile human in the end.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter if you are the President, you are still a fragile human in the end.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is no way you can oppose one who inherited a Demon Lord's hierarchy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is no way you can oppose one who inherited a Demon Lord's hierarchy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is no way you can oppose one who inherited a Demon Lord's hierarchy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And in this fight, Mother is protecting someone like you while she battles.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And in this fight, Mother is protecting someone like you while she battles.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And in this fight, Mother is protecting someone like you while she battles.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In a situation like this, if the President freezes time...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In a situation like this, if the President freezes time...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In a situation like this, if the President freezes time...

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Gha'agsheblah Fragment will immediately target the President, and she will have no choice but to respond.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Gha'agsheblah Fragment will immediately target the President, and she will have no choice but to respond.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Gha'agsheblah Fragment will immediately target the President, and she will have no choice but to respond.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Like a hamster wheel turning, the situation will continue to fall into a stalemate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Like a hamster wheel turning, the situation will continue to fall into a stalemate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like a hamster wheel turning, the situation will continue to fall into a stalemate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: How does it feel, Dean of Religion?
root.m_Talk_DEU: How does it feel, Dean of Religion?
root.m_Talk_FRA: How does it feel, Dean of Religion?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A scene you have long desired is unfolding right before your eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A scene you have long desired is unfolding right before your eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A scene you have long desired is unfolding right before your eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, that's certainly true.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, that's certainly true.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, that's certainly true.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If this war of attrition keeps repeating, those grotesque beings might all end up destroying each other.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If this war of attrition keeps repeating, those grotesque beings might all end up destroying each other.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If this war of attrition keeps repeating, those grotesque beings might all end up destroying each other.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But since you're going this far, it actually makes me curious.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But since you're going this far, it actually makes me curious.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But since you're going this far, it actually makes me curious.

root.m_Talk_ENG: About the bigger picture you're envisioning, scriptwriter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: About the bigger picture you're envisioning, scriptwriter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: About the bigger picture you're envisioning, scriptwriter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The bigger picture?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The bigger picture?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The bigger picture?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Charade is annihilated and the Society and the faction come into conflict, what benefit is left for you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Charade is annihilated and the Society and the faction come into conflict, what benefit is left for you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Charade is annihilated and the Society and the faction come into conflict, what benefit is left for you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you simply enjoy watching the world burn? Well, I suppose that wouldn't be so bad either.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you simply enjoy watching the world burn? Well, I suppose that wouldn't be so bad either.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you simply enjoy watching the world burn? Well, I suppose that wouldn't be so bad either.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, of course not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, of course not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, of course not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is only one thing I desire.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is only one thing I desire.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is only one thing I desire.

root.m_Talk_ENG: World peace.
root.m_Talk_DEU: World peace.
root.m_Talk_FRA: World peace.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahaha, you've got quite the audacity.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahaha, you've got quite the audacity.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahaha, you've got quite the audacity.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After plotting a script like this behind the scenes, you claim to want world peace?
root.m_Talk_DEU: After plotting a script like this behind the scenes, you claim to want world peace?
root.m_Talk_FRA: After plotting a script like this behind the scenes, you claim to want world peace?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I mean it sincerely.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I mean it sincerely.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I mean it sincerely.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone I know once said this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone I know once said this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone I know once said this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There is a difference between protecting the world as it stands, and protecting it even at the cost of breaking it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There is a difference between protecting the world as it stands, and protecting it even at the cost of breaking it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There is a difference between protecting the world as it stands, and protecting it even at the cost of breaking it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I can join hands even with a villain like you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I can join hands even with a villain like you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I can join hands even with a villain like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fufu, calling me a villain outright is rather hurtful, you know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fufu, calling me a villain outright is rather hurtful, you know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fufu, calling me a villain outright is rather hurtful, you know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once the omen phenomenon has begun, there was no way to stop it from the start.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once the omen phenomenon has begun, there was no way to stop it from the start.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once the omen phenomenon has begun, there was no way to stop it from the start.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, we use the phenomenon itself to eliminate variables.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, we use the phenomenon itself to eliminate variables.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, we use the phenomenon itself to eliminate variables.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We remove in advance anything that would interfere with the Qliphoth Game that will begin soon.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We remove in advance anything that would interfere with the Qliphoth Game that will begin soon.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We remove in advance anything that would interfere with the Qliphoth Game that will begin soon.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, it seems the time has finally come.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, it seems the time has finally come.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, it seems the time has finally come.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The time to bring this stalemate to an end by playing the final card we prepared...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The time to bring this stalemate to an end by playing the final card we prepared...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The time to bring this stalemate to an end by playing the final card we prepared...

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's useless, Knight of the Lake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's useless, Knight of the Lake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's useless, Knight of the Lake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You are an Apostle. A being of lower standing than the Demon Lords of Qliphoth,
root.m_Talk_DEU: You are an Apostle. A being of lower standing than the Demon Lords of Qliphoth,
root.m_Talk_FRA: You are an Apostle. A being of lower standing than the Demon Lords of Qliphoth,

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those chains are merely a weapon meant to oppose Divinity. It has no meaning to someone without Divinity like me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those chains are merely a weapon meant to oppose Divinity. It has no meaning to someone without Divinity like me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those chains are merely a weapon meant to oppose Divinity. It has no meaning to someone without Divinity like me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With my ability, I can counter it as many times as I like.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With my ability, I can counter it as many times as I like.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With my ability, I can counter it as many times as I like.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Truly, a monster of reason.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Truly, a monster of reason.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Truly, a monster of reason.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've only exchanged a single blow, yet you see through everything as if it were laid bare...
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've only exchanged a single blow, yet you see through everything as if it were laid bare...
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've only exchanged a single blow, yet you see through everything as if it were laid bare...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, the human body has clear limits.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, the human body has clear limits.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, the human body has clear limits.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You cannot compare to an Apostle who can draw power from Mother's Qlipha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You cannot compare to an Apostle who can draw power from Mother's Qlipha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You cannot compare to an Apostle who can draw power from Mother's Qlipha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Allow even a single wound, and that will be your end, MacCready.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Allow even a single wound, and that will be your end, MacCready.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Allow even a single wound, and that will be your end, MacCready.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then let us put it to the test, Knight of the Lake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then let us put it to the test, Knight of the Lake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then let us put it to the test, Knight of the Lake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Between the MacCready bloodline and the Apostle of Gha'agsheblah. Let us see who truly bears the Lake's blessing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Between the MacCready bloodline and the Apostle of Gha'agsheblah. Let us see who truly bears the Lake's blessing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Between the MacCready bloodline and the Apostle of Gha'agsheblah. Let us see who truly bears the Lake's blessing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahahaha! Don't we look ridiculous, Mother?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahahaha! Don't we look ridiculous, Mother?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahahaha! Don't we look ridiculous, Mother?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tearing into each other's flesh like this. Is this what you call going in circles?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tearing into each other's flesh like this. Is this what you call going in circles?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tearing into each other's flesh like this. Is this what you call going in circles?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, tasting Mother's flesh again after so long is exquisitely sweet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, tasting Mother's flesh again after so long is exquisitely sweet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, tasting Mother's flesh again after so long is exquisitely sweet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's unfortunate, Disturber.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's unfortunate, Disturber.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's unfortunate, Disturber.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you wanted to stand at eye level with me, you should have gathered far more Fragments.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you wanted to stand at eye level with me, you should have gathered far more Fragments.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you wanted to stand at eye level with me, you should have gathered far more Fragments.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In truth, we've been secretly cheering for you, Disturber.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In truth, we've been secretly cheering for you, Disturber.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In truth, we've been secretly cheering for you, Disturber.

root.m_Talk_ENG: After all, every Fragment of Gha'agsheblah you collected will eventually return to us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After all, every Fragment of Gha'agsheblah you collected will eventually return to us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After all, every Fragment of Gha'agsheblah you collected will eventually return to us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hahaha, so what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hahaha, so what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hahaha, so what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And if that happens, do you think the current Regina, who froze her emotions and became a doll, would be happy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And if that happens, do you think the current Regina, who froze her emotions and became a doll, would be happy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And if that happens, do you think the current Regina, who froze her emotions and became a doll, would be happy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Disturber...! How dare you mock our Regina again...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Disturber...! How dare you mock our Regina again...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Disturber...! How dare you mock our Regina again...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's why a mother who only knows to <color=#ff3636>devour</color> can never understand <color=#ff3636>taste</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's why a mother who only knows to <color=#ff3636>devour</color> can never understand <color=#ff3636>taste</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's why a mother who only knows to <color=#ff3636>devour</color> can never understand <color=#ff3636>taste</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those desperate human emotions are delicacies no information could ever replicate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those desperate human emotions are delicacies no information could ever replicate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those desperate human emotions are delicacies no information could ever replicate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Devouring an emotionless Regina would leave you tasting nothing at all, you know?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Devouring an emotionless Regina would leave you tasting nothing at all, you know?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Devouring an emotionless Regina would leave you tasting nothing at all, you know?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've listened long enough. This conversation has sunk to a level I can no longer tolerate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've listened long enough. This conversation has sunk to a level I can no longer tolerate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've listened long enough. This conversation has sunk to a level I can no longer tolerate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? That voice...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? That voice...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? That voice...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, Burnett...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, Burnett...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, Burnett...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know! Deploying Sealing Chains!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know! Deploying Sealing Chains!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know! Deploying Sealing Chains!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Those chains...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Those chains...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Those chains...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that you? How laughable, you whelp!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that you? How laughable, you whelp!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that you? How laughable, you whelp!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really think chains like these could bind Mother...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really think chains like these could bind Mother...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really think chains like these could bind Mother...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. I figured if I aimed the Sealing Chains at that girl, you'd come charging in right away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. I figured if I aimed the Sealing Chains at that girl, you'd come charging in right away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. I figured if I aimed the Sealing Chains at that girl, you'd come charging in right away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? You don't mean...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? You don't mean...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? You don't mean...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now's the time, rookie! Leave the backup to me...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now's the time, rookie! Leave the backup to me...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now's the time, rookie! Leave the backup to me...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A strike imbued with Divinity?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A strike imbued with Divinity?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A strike imbued with Divinity?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't tell me... a new Gha'agsheblah Fragment...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't tell me... a new Gha'agsheblah Fragment...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't tell me... a new Gha'agsheblah Fragment...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My knight! Are you all right...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: My knight! Are you all right...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: My knight! Are you all right...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is nothing to worry about, Mother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is nothing to worry about, Mother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is nothing to worry about, Mother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-how was it, Toto...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-how was it, Toto...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-how was it, Toto...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What? That's harsh! But still...! It was my first time swinging a sword...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: What? That's harsh! But still...! It was my first time swinging a sword...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: What? That's harsh! But still...! It was my first time swinging a sword...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh! You stupid wench! You're seriously frustrating!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh! You stupid wench! You're seriously frustrating!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh! You stupid wench! You're seriously frustrating!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You couldn't even finish off one target, and what? This is your first time swinging a sword?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You couldn't even finish off one target, and what? This is your first time swinging a sword?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You couldn't even finish off one target, and what? This is your first time swinging a sword?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, give me a break! Then what was all that stuff you made me do before, huh? Was I a back scratcher? A flyswatter?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, give me a break! Then what was all that stuff you made me do before, huh? Was I a back scratcher? A flyswatter?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, give me a break! Then what was all that stuff you made me do before, huh? Was I a back scratcher? A flyswatter?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, all bust and no brains. Is your head completely empty?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, all bust and no brains. Is your head completely empty?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, all bust and no brains. Is your head completely empty?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's with the sigh, scumbag? You wanna die?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's with the sigh, scumbag? You wanna die?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's with the sigh, scumbag? You wanna die?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how many times I see it, I can't get used to that...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how many times I see it, I can't get used to that...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how many times I see it, I can't get used to that...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aah, been well, everyone from the Gha'agsheblah family?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aah, been well, everyone from the Gha'agsheblah family?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aah, been well, everyone from the Gha'agsheblah family?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You all look so happy without me and it really makes my blood boil. So I'm the bastard here, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You all look so happy without me and it really makes my blood boil. So I'm the bastard here, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You all look so happy without me and it really makes my blood boil. So I'm the bastard here, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you the...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you the...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you the...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's the Chaser. The <color=#ffd34c>Hound of Tindalos</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's the Chaser. The <color=#ffd34c>Hound of Tindalos</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's the Chaser. The <color=#ffd34c>Hound of Tindalos</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's with the fancy real name? Just call me Toto.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's with the fancy real name? Just call me Toto.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's with the fancy real name? Just call me Toto.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So I call you Mom? Then would this one be Sis?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So I call you Mom? Then would this one be Sis?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So I call you Mom? Then would this one be Sis?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh, that's weird. Why does she look so young?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh, that's weird. Why does she look so young?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh, that's weird. Why does she look so young?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah well, who cares!
